design_decisions.d0_open_oeq_residuals: Open-ended question(s) left as the note's acknowledged open problem for D0.5 review: oeq:polynomial-delay-enumeration

proposed_from.topic: Polynomial-delay exact vertex calculus for sharp ATE bounds in the discrete IV model with MULTI-VALUED instruments (binary treatment D, outcome Y in [n], instrument Z in [l], no monotonicity), closing the l>2 gap that Boushehrian-Akbari et al. (arXiv:2604.12802) explicitly defer and the projection Song-Guo-Chan-Richardson (arXiv:2405.09510) explicitly defer: work over the GAUGE-FIXED SECTION H0(n,l) = H(n,l) cap {lambda_(0,0,z)=0, z=2..l} of the sharp-ATE dual polyhedron H(n,l)={lambda : (A'lambda)_tau >= c_tau for all canonical types tau=(delta,eta)}, since H itself has lineality space {per-arm-block constants summing to zero} of dimension l-1 and hence no vertices, while H0 is pointed and meets each gauge orbit once so its vertices biject with the M-classes (lambda ~ lambda' iff A'lambda = A'lambda'); conjecture (I-a) the ACTIVITY-SET RECOGNITION problem VERT-REC -- given (n,l) in unary and an explicit type list B, decide whether some vertex lambda of H0(n,l) has Sig(lambda) := {tau : (A'lambda)_tau = c_tau} equal to B -- is solvable in time polynomial in n+l+|B|, which is non-trivial because the defining system has 2^l*n^2 inequalities so the naive test is exponential in l; conjecture (ii), THE CENTRAL THEOREM, that there is a POLYNOMIAL-DELAY SOUND-AND-COMPLETE enumerator of the vertices of H0(n,l) (input (n,l) in unary, each output the rational coefficient vector in R^(2nl), delay polynomial in n+l), so the sharp bounds become L(P)=max and U(P)=min of explicit linear functionals of P(y,d|z) in analytical closed form instead of a numerically solved LP -- non-tautological since vertex enumeration for inequality-presented polyhedra admits no polynomial-delay algorithm unless P=NP (Khachiyan-Boros-Borys-Elbassioni-Gurvich, DCG 2008); and conjecture (iii) STRICT INCOMPLETENESS BY CARDINALITY of the arm-indexed l>2 family of arXiv:2604.12802, whose size is at most l*((l-1)^(n-1)-(l-1)) (at most l*((l-1)^n-(l-1)) under the alternative reading of its exponent). NO counting-formula theorem is claimed: N(n,l) is just the enumerator's output size, with N(n,2)=5*4^(n-1)-2^(n+2)+4 retained only as a consistency check against the published l=2 result. The recognition algorithm, the enumerator, and the deficit are the solve's derivation work. Exact rational witness at (n,l)=(2,3): a THREE-ARM-ESSENTIAL vertex of H0 with lambda blocks (2,1,2,1),(0,-2,-2,0),(0,1,0,1) in the order ((y=0,d=0),(y=1,d=0),(y=0,d=1),(y=1,d=1)), verified over Q by nine independent checks -- zero of 32 dual constraints violated, section conditions satisfied, q* normalized and nonnegative with Aq*=p exactly, strong duality c'q*=lambda'p=101/2004, |Sig|=12 with rank 12-of-12 vertex certification, and all three arm-blocks non-constant so it cannot arise from any two-arm sub-instrument; the same exact pipeline reproduces the published l=2 count exactly at (2,2) (8 of 8) and certifies at least 38 M-classes at (2,3) versus A1's at-most-6. Estimation rung: the endpoints are a max/min of finitely many explicit linear functionals of the cell probabilities over an index set the enumerator supplies in closed form, so plug-in estimation uses empirical cell frequencies and inference proceeds by intersection-bounds / max-of-means over a FINITE EXPLICIT index set -- exactly what current numerical-LP practice lacks. Consumers: judge/examiner-IV designs (Dobbie-Goldin-Yang AER 2018; Frandsen-Lefgren-Leslie Ecta 2023; Kling AER 2006), which collapse a many-armed judge instrument to a scalar leniency index and would instead report an assumption-free sharp ATE interval using all arms; and causaloptim's optimize_effect_2, whose generic vertex enumeration is its documented bottleneck
proposed_from.novelty_justification: Published axis: BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 prove a complete vertex/signature calculus only for \(l=2\) and explicitly defer multivalued sharp characterization. The proposed object is not a routine generalization from \(l=2\): it demands a polynomial-delay rational enumerator over an implicitly exponential type system after quotienting its \(l-1\)-dimensional lineality, together with a multiarity active-set recognizer. SongGuoChanRichardson2024 characterize categorical-IV compatibility but leave endpoint computation as convex programming, not a complete sharp affine-term catalogue. Repository axis: no inspected CausalSmith proposal addresses the unrestricted multivalued-IV dual; \texttt{pid\_iv\_bounded\_defier\_envelope} concerns a different binary-IV capped model and lacks this quotient-enumeration kernel.
seed_list: Enumerate every gauge-fixed multivalued-IV sharp-ATE dual vertex with polynomial delay from the implicit response-type system.
Recognize an exact multivalued-IV active type set in time polynomial in its explicit encoding.
Characterize when an all-arm categorical-IV ATE interval is strictly tighter than every two-arm restriction.
Give an irredundant observed-law instrumental-inequality catalogue for multivalued outcomes and instruments.
Develop binding-vertex-adaptive inference after an explicit multivalued-IV affine endpoint representation is available.
Complete the affine-facet catalogue for binary IV with simultaneous defier and never-taker caps.
Lift a rational three-arm-essential dual witness to a nondegenerate regime of omitted multivalued-IV vertices.
Construct a necessary-and-sufficient exposure criterion for a sharp ATE endpoint that cannot descend to a two-arm subinstrument.

seed_details.one_line: Enumerate every gauge-fixed multivalued-IV sharp-ATE dual vertex with polynomial delay from the implicit response-type system.

anchor_paper.author: Boushehrian et al.
anchor_paper.claim: It gives a complete binary-instrument calculus but only a multivalued lower-bound family.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: We leave such sharp characterizations for multi-valued instruments as future work.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The focal object is an output-sensitive algorithm, not merely an LP restatement.
seed_details.referee_objection: Immediate from generic reverse search once a gauge is imposed.
seed_details.rebuttal: Generic inequality enumeration does not avoid the implicit exponential type system or establish polynomial delay in \(n+l\).
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: AvisFukuda1996 supplies generic reverse search; BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 supplies only \(l=2\) structural signatures.

seed_details.one_line: Recognize an exact multivalued-IV active type set in time polynomial in its explicit encoding.

anchor_paper.author: Boushehrian et al.
anchor_paper.claim: Binary admissible signatures biject with M-distinct vertices.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: Here we show that there is a bijection between vertices and their signatures.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The task asks exact equality of an implicit activity set, not a routine rank test on a listed basis.
seed_details.referee_objection: Solve the displayed tight equations and check rank.
seed_details.rebuttal: Exactness requires ruling out unlisted tight response types and feasibility over a family indexed by \(2^l\) treatment functions.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 solves this only at \(l=2\); no multiarity certificate is supplied.

seed_details.one_line: Characterize when an all-arm categorical-IV ATE interval is strictly tighter than every two-arm restriction.

anchor_paper.author: Song et al.
anchor_paper.claim: Keeping all arms cannot widen plug-in intervals and can sometimes strictly tighten them.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: using data from all the instrument arms will lead to plug-in intervals that are no wider

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: An iff exposure condition would be stronger than a single strict-gain illustration.
seed_details.referee_objection: Set inclusion already proves the result.
seed_details.rebuttal: Set inclusion gives weak tightening only and contains no criterion for strictness at a law.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: SongGuoChanRichardson2024 leaves the strictness frontier uncharacterized.

seed_details.one_line: Give an irredundant observed-law instrumental-inequality catalogue for multivalued outcomes and instruments.

anchor_paper.author: Song et al.
anchor_paper.claim: It characterizes latent counterfactual compatibility and optimizes with a convex program.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: can be used to obtain partial identification bounds ... with the help of existing linear programming software

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The target is an irredundant observed-law system, not a rerun of latent feasibility.
seed_details.rebuttal: Generic elimination supplies no irredundancy, structure, or output-sensitive generation guarantee.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: SongGuoChanRichardson2024 defer explicit projection; BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 give a lower-bound family only.

seed_details.one_line: Develop binding-vertex-adaptive inference after an explicit multivalued-IV affine endpoint representation is available.

anchor_paper.author: Song et al.
anchor_paper.claim: It gives simultaneous finite-sample confidence intervals through a KL-based convex region.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: construct confidence intervals with simultaneous finite-sample coverage

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The primary shape is a nonsmooth finite-extrema inference problem, not a bare M8 label.
seed_details.referee_objection: Chernozhukov--Lee--Rosen already resolves maxima of means.
seed_details.rebuttal: Their theory does not create the requisite explicit multivalued-IV index set or prove its complexity control.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013 is an inference ancestor; SongGuoChanRichardson2024 calls for less conservative computation indirectly.

seed_details.one_line: Complete the affine-facet catalogue for binary IV with simultaneous defier and never-taker caps.

anchor_paper.author: CausalSmith prior proposal
anchor_paper.claim: Its rejected angle did not establish exhaustive or nonredundant endpoint facets.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: does not yet fix the final count of affine facets

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The missing object is an exhaustive catalogue with primal certificates.
seed_details.referee_objection: A finite LP can always be enumerated.
seed_details.rebuttal: The unresolved part is an analytic irredundant description across boundary regimes.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: The prior proposal has no exhaustive exposed-basis proof.

seed_details.one_line: Lift a rational three-arm-essential dual witness to a nondegenerate regime of omitted multivalued-IV vertices.

anchor_paper.author: Boushehrian et al.
anchor_paper.claim: Its multivalued theorem is a lower-bound construction rather than a complete catalogue.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: we construct a family of M-distinct vertices

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The seed requires a regime statement, not a hand-picked \(2,3\) witness.
seed_details.referee_objection: A single rational vertex is a computation, not a contribution.
seed_details.rebuttal: Only a lifting or perturbation-stable regime would survive this objection.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 do not establish strict incompleteness of their family.

seed_details.one_line: Construct a necessary-and-sufficient exposure criterion for a sharp ATE endpoint that cannot descend to a two-arm subinstrument.

anchor_paper.author: Song et al.
anchor_paper.claim: It documents weak all-arm improvement without an exposure criterion.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: The focal object is a necessary-and-sufficient dual exposure criterion.
seed_details.referee_objection: Equivalent to comparing finitely many LP values.
seed_details.rebuttal: A criterion in observed-law primitives must eliminate all latent and optimization quantifiers.
seed_details.nearest_result_and_gap: SongGuoChanRichardson2024 has no iff condition; BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 has no all-arm exposure catalogue.

proposed_from.literature_map: BoushehrianBadriAkbariKiyavash2026 is the direct anchor: its Section 4.1 gives binary signatures and its Section 4.2 gives only a multivalued lower-bound family; the Conclusion defers sharp multivalued characterizations. BalkePearl1997 supplies the finite response-type LP and sharpness logic. SongGuoChanRichardson2024 gives categorical-IV compatibility, convex-program bounds, and an all-arm empirical motivation, but not a dual vertex catalogue. AvisFukuda1996 supplies the reverse-search template, while KhachiyanBorosBorysElbassioniGurvich2008 prevents importing a generic polynomial-delay conclusion. ReimersStougie2016 shows that special matrix structure can make vertex enumeration tractable, motivating an IV-specific decomposition. DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 provides a response-function search route for exact witnesses. ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013 supplies the downstream finite-extrema inference framework. The prior-proposal bounded-defier facet catalogue is adjacent but is binary-IV and does not subsume activity-set recognition or multivalued enumeration.

banked_reason: User-directed stop: the contribution was misframed at field tier; Boushehrian et al. already prove a broad multivalued-IV lower bound, and this run's quantitative strengthening is incremental rather than field-novel.
